name: Highland Fondue
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Grated Scottish or mature cheese
Cubes of rye and onion bread (for serving)
recipeInstructions:
1. Put onion and butter into a saucepan.
2. Cook over gentle heat until soft.
3. Add milk and heat until bubbling.
4. Gradually stir in cheese and continue to cook until melted, stirring frequently.
5. In a small bowl, blend cornflour smoothly with whiskey.
6. Stir the mixture into the cheese and cook for 2-3 minutes until thickened, stirring frequently.
7. Pour into the fondue pot.
8. Serve with cubes of rye and onion bread.
(Serves 4-6)
